metadata.homeTitle: Changuk Woo · Web Developer, expanding into SAR
metadata.homeDescription: Self-diagnosed coordinates on a 5-stage AI usage model + 5 projects (snap · sdpe · sar-data-retrieval · him · Brain Trinity) — currently at stage 3+4.

faq.title: Questions you might have
faq.subtitle: The questions recruiters and AI search tend to ask, gathered in one place. Each answer links straight to a deeper page.

pipeline.title: The path data takes — pipelines by project
pipeline.lede: A quick look at how data travels — input → processing → user (or product) — across three projects: the SAR platform, SDPE, and him. The precise call graphs live in each project's detail diagram.
pipeline.returnNote: Location / AOI requests flow the other way (dashed) — fresh analysis runs only on a cache miss
pipeline.cardHint: Click a card for that layer's detail

career.title: Where & what — from frontend to full-stack
career.lede: Starting at Lumir with the satellite-imagery search frontend, then through internal systems, I'm now expanding into full-stack — owning the whole cycle across backend, SAR processing, and AI.

coordinates.title: Stage diagnosis starts from your main role
coordinates.lede: The same SAR work means something different when a geospatial-engineering major does it as their main role versus when a web developer does it as a domain expansion. The matrix below and the 5-stage model anchor my current coordinates.
coordinates.stagesTitle: AI usage · 5 stages — in my own words

projects.title: Same ingredients. Different course.
projects.lede: An assembled resume — the same 6 projects read differently for different audiences. Use the track toggle below to switch the depth and angle to the company / domain context.

projectDetail.subProjectsTitle: Each of the 3 layers in detail
projectDetail.subProjectsLede: Each layer of the integrated box, expanded. These are the deep-link landing points for external search and sharing.

techStack.title: Main role · Learned domain · Future
techStack.lede: I separate my main role (web development) from the learned domain (SAR · satellite imagery) picked up at work. Depth-within-role and role-expansion are two distinct things.

about.brainTrinityBody1Pre: This portfolio, the self-diagnosis, and all 6 project briefs were compiled from a meta system called
about.brainTrinityBody1Post: . It uses the Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern + Claude Code collaboration + a skill system, and currently holds 56+ accumulated wiki pages.
about.brainTrinityBody2: Given an unfamiliar domain, I believe structured information + an AI-native foundation can solve almost anything. Brain Trinity is both the methodology and the asset — and I can demo it live in an interview.

contact.baseNote: This is the base version of the resume. Once a target JD is in hand, the depth and emphasis will be reassembled for *the actual reader*.
